final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] cache;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            cache <= data_in; // Write data to cache
        end else begin
            data_out <= cache; // Read data from cache
        end
    end
endmodule
